title: Regression during compilation of Verilated output - "invalid use of non-static data member"

features.name: virtual class with parameterized static function calling another parameterized class static method
features.description: Code should include a parameterized virtual class containing a static function that calls a static method from another parameterized class using :: operator

features.name: nested for loops with generate labels inside static function in parameterized class
features.description: Code should include nested for loops with generate block labels inside a static function within a parameterized class
features.snippet:
for(i=0; i<p_width; i++) begin : gen_outer
for(j=0; j<p_width; j++) begin : gen_inner
bus_array[i][j] = inb[((i+j)>=p_width) ? (i+j)-p_width : (i+j)];
end
end

features.name: 2D unpacked array in parameterized class static function
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array declared inside a static function in a parameterized class

features.name: static function return assignment with unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a static function that assigns to the function name using an unpacked array element
